name: Ubiquiti Quick Mount
title: Ubiquiti Quick Mount
short_description: Ubiquiti’s Quick Mount is engineered to facilitate a streamlined and efficient mounting process for various Ubiquiti devices for additional mounting flexibility and device alignment options. The Quick-Mount accessory kit emphasizes ease of installation, features an easy-to-use, toolless design. Once installed, the Quick Mount provides a secure and stable platform for Ubiquiti devices, reducing the risk of movement due to wind or incidental contact. It includes locking mechanisms to keep the mount firmly in place, enhancing the overall security of the installation.
description: Made from weather-resistant materials, the Quick Mount is built to withstand harsh environmental conditions, including UV exposure, rain, and extreme temperatures, ensuring long-term durability and performance stability. The kit includes Mount Arm, Universal Ball Mount, bracket mount, rotation collar (stabilizes the base of the mount arm), stacking washer (locks the rotation collar into place) and ball mount washer.

detailed_description.text: Ubiquiti’s Quick Mount is engineered to facilitate a streamlined and efficient mounting process for various Ubiquiti devices for additional mounting flexibility and device alignment options. The Quick-Mount accessory kit emphasizes ease of installation, features an easy-to-use, toolless design. Once installed, the Quick Mount provides a secure and stable platform for Ubiquiti devices, reducing the risk of movement due to wind or incidental contact. It includes locking mechanisms to keep the mount firmly in place, enhancing the overall security of the installation.

detailed_description.heading: Features
detailed_description.text:
No tools required
Quick and easy installation
Flexible, easy alignment
Supports NanoStation, NanoStation Loco, and NanoBeam devices

Made from weather-resistant materials, the Quick Mount is built to withstand harsh environmental conditions, including UV exposure, rain, and extreme temperatures, ensuring long-term durability and performance stability. The kit includes Mount Arm, Universal Ball Mount, bracket mount, rotation collar (stabilizes the base of the mount arm), stacking washer (locks the rotation collar into place) and ball mount washer.

detailed_description.heading: Supported Products
detailed_description.text:
NBE-2AC-13, NBE-M5-16, UBB, or GBE using the Universal Ball Mount
NBE-5AC-Gen2 or NBE-M5-19 using the Universal Ball Mount and Ball Mount Washer
loco5AC, NS-5AC, or LTU-Lite using the Bracket Mount
